prestazioni: Engine swap to a 4HK1-TCN 5.2L turbo-diesel inline-4 (from the Isuzu Forward) with a BorgWarner EFR 8374 turbocharger, custom 12mm billet fuel pump, and a Motec M150 ECU for precise fuel mapping and boost control (targeting 45 psi peak boost for 450 hp at the wheels).

Full drivetrain reinforcement with a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (ISUZU ELF-specific flywheel), Quaife ATB differential (modified for the ELF’s 6-speed MYY6 transmission), and a custom driveshaft from Driveshaft Shop (3.5-inch chromoly with CV joints).

Suspension overhaul using Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (custom valving for the ELF’s ladder-frame chassis), polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF0116K for front control arms), and a Whiteline 24mm rear sway bar (ELF-specific mounting brackets).
estetica: Rocket Bunny widebody kit (ELF 150/250 series-specific, with carbon fiber fender flares and custom aluminum inner fender liners), paired with a custom front splitter from Seibon Carbon (3D-scanned for the ELF’s bumper).
Custom rear diffuser from APR Performance (modified to fit the ELF’s flatbed or box truck variants) with integrated dual 4-inch exhaust exits (stainless steel from Burns Stainless).

Full JDM-inspired livery using 3M 1080 vinyl in ‘Isuzu Racing Yellow’ with ‘ELF RACING’ decals (font: Eurostile Extended), custom LED taillights from Depo Racing (ELF-specific housing), and a carbon fiber hood from VIS Racing (heat-extracting vents over the turbo).
